title: Chewy Spanish Parmesan Paella
description: A quick, umami-packed, FODMAP-friendly paella with a cheesy Parmesan finish and a delightful chewy texture.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large, shallow pan over medium heat.
Add tomatoes and cook until softened, about 2 minutes.
Stir in rice, coating it with oil and tomatoes.
Add smoked paprika and saffron, toast for 1 minute.
Whisk the chicken broth with a pinch of salt, then pour into the pan.
Bring to a gentle simmer, reduce heat to low, cover loosely, and cook 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add peas after 10 minutes of cooking and stir to combine.
Once rice is al dente and liquid absorbed, remove from heat.
Sprinkle grated Parmesan over the top, cover, and let sit 5 minutes to melt, then fluff with a fork.
Garnish with parsley, season with salt and pepper, and serve immediately.
